Variables.Name: DefaultSoundClassName
Variables.Description: The SoundClass assigned to newly created sounds

Variables.Name: DefaultSoundConcurrencyName
Variables.Description: The SoundConcurrency assigned to newly created sounds

Variables.Name: DefaultBaseSoundMix
Variables.Description: The SoundMix to use as base when no other system has specified a Base SoundMix

Variables.Name: VoiPSoundClass
Variables.Description: Sound class to be used for the VOIP audio component

Variables.Name: DefaultReverbSendLevel
Variables.Description: The amount of audio to send to reverb submixes if no reverb send is setup for the source through attenuation settings. Only used in audio mixer.

Variables.Name: MaximumConcurrentStreams
Variables.Description: How many streaming sounds can be played at the same time (if more are played they will be sorted by priority)

Variables.Name: bAllowVirtualizedSounds
Variables.Description: Allows sounds to play at 0 volume.

Variables.Name: bDisableMasterEQ
Variables.Description: Disables master EQ effect in the audio DSP graph.

Variables.Name: bDisableMasterReverb
Variables.Description: Disables master reverb effect in the audio DSP graph.

Variables.Name: bAllowCenterChannel3DPanning
Variables.Description: Enables the surround sound spatialization calculations to include the center channel.

Variables.Name: AkEventCppNotifyClass
Variables.Description: UAnimNotify_AkEventCpp is the subclass of UAnimNotify.

Variables.Name: TimedAkEventNotifyStateClass
Variables.Description: UAnimNotifyState_TimedAkEvent is the subclass of UAnimNotifyState.

Variables.Name: AkAudioEventSearchDepth
Variables.Description: Search depth when trying to link commerce animation montage with its AkAudioEvent.

Variables.Name: bUsePreCachedMontageMap
Variables.Description: Whether to use pre-cached map for AkAudio-Montages searching.

Variables.Name: bDynamicPreCachedMontageMap
Variables.Description: Whether to dynamically update pre-cached map for AkAudio-Montages searching.
